# Appendix: Nonlinear least squares {nonlinear-least-squares}

```{r nonlinear-least-squares-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/nonlinear-least-squares-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/nonlinear-least-squares/"
)
```

```{r child-nonlinear-least-squares, child="../lecture-content/40-nonlinear-least-squares.Rmd"}
```
